title: The Lead Gen Machine
hook: This workflow replaced a full-time employee. No joke.
voiceoverScript: This workflow replaced a full-time employee. No joke. A real estate agency was paying someone three thousand a month just to follow up with leads. I built a Make automation that captures leads from their website, sends a personalized email within two minutes, and follows up three times over the next week. All automatic. The result? Their response rate went up forty percent. And they fired the follow-up person. Not because they wanted to. Because the bot was better. Three thousand dollars a month saved. I built it in four hours. Would you use this? Save this for later and follow for tomorrow's automation.

scenes.label: Automated Lead Follow-up
scenes.text: Real estate agency paying $3K/mo for lead follow-up. Built a Make workflow instead.

scenes.label: Saved Monthly
scenes.text: Better results. Zero salary. The bot never takes a sick day.
